response.step_by_step_log: The video was carefully reviewed to detect any segments featuring vocal musical performances. Anya Melfissa speaks throughout the entire video regarding her birthday and merchandise items. No vocal songs were detected. Background audio consists solely of instrumental music. Consequently, all scenes were marked with 'contains_vocal_music: false', and song metadata fields were set to null.
response.global_summary: The video is a monologue by VTuber Anya Melfissa discussing her 3D birthday celebration and presenting new merchandise items. There is no vocal music performed by the character in this clip; only ambient instrumental background music is present.

scenes.description: Anya Melfissa introduces herself and talks about her birthday and detective theme.
Anya presents the birthday merchandise: Canvas Art, a Notebook, and a Pen Case.
Anya presents the situational voice pack.
Anya presents the bonus items for the limited and standard edition birthday sets.
